allow: Bash(mkdir -p client/src/pages client/src/components/ui client/src/api client/src/styles server/src/routes server/src/controllers server/src/services server/src/database server/src/utils server/src/middleware templates database uploads docs)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/quotations -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"customer_name\\":\\"Test User\\",\\"customer_mobile\\":\\"+91 98700 00000\\",\\"customer_email\\":\\"test@x.in\\",\\"occasion\\":\\"Anniversary\\",\\"product_name\\":\\"Eternal Bloom\\",\\"product_category\\":\\"Ring\\",\\"product_description\\":\\"Test description\\",\\"purity\\":\\"18Kt\\",\\"metal_type\\":\\"Gold\\",\\"metal_color\\":\\"Yellow\\",\\"net_weight\\":5,\\"gross_weight\\":5.2,\\"gold_rate_per_gram\\":5800,\\"diamond_type\\":\\"Natural\\",\\"diamond_shape\\":\\"Round\\",\\"diamond_carat\\":1,\\"diamond_rate_per_carat\\":85000,\\"making_charge_type\\":\\"per_gram\\",\\"making_charge_value\\":1200,\\"shipping_charge\\":500,\\"hallmark_charge\\":250,\\"sales_executive\\":\\"Priya Mehta\\"}")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; $conns | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path } } else { "Port 5000 free" })
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; "KILLED" } else { "FREE" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; q=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('quote rate:', q['gold_rate_per_gram'], '| latest 18Kt: 6000 | FROZEN:', q['gold_rate_per_gram']!=6000\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data'];row=[r for r in d if r['purity']=='22Kt'][0];print\(f\\"22Kt now: ₹{row['rate_per_gram']} source={row['source']} override={row['is_override']}\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data'];row=[r for r in d if r['purity']=='22Kt'][0];print\('22Kt rate=' + str\(row['rate_per_gram']\) + ' source=' + row['source'] + ' override=' + str\(row['is_override']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data'];print\('quote_id=' + d['quote_id'] + ' location=' + str\(d.get\('pricing_location'\)\) + ' gold_rate=' + str\(d['gold_rate_per_gram']\) + ' final=' + str\(d['final_price']\)\)")
